title: Refined Vanilla
body:
![REFINED VANILLA Title Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba4238d7879cdaba35acf5273587def21d2550ed.png)

**Refined Vanilla** is a high-effort connected textures resource pack designed to add and smoothen transitions between blocks.

The purpose of this pack is to provide a cleaner aesthetic to blocks in vanilla Minecraft without straying from the vanilla feel.

Made for Continuity.
